name: Bridgeport Golf Club
address: 3612 S Morgan St Unit 5, Chicago, IL 60609
about: Bridgeport Golf Club is a members-only indoor golf facility located on Chicago's Southside, offering year-round access to six state-of-the-art hitting bays. The venue provides a premium golfing experience with expert instruction and a community-focused environment. Members benefit from flexible scheduling, personalized access codes, and the ability to book sessions through a mobile app or website without peak-hour restrictions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan and Uneekor launch monitor technology
Flexible scheduling with no peak-hour restrictions
Inclusive community with member leagues and social events
Secure personal access codes for convenient play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Three bays equipped with TrackMan launch monitors
Three bays equipped with Uneekor EyeXO launch monitors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members should bring their own clubs, though the venue may offer club rentals for visitors or new members.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No specific policy mentioned, but as a members-only facility, outside food and drink may be permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: No specific time mentioned, but members can book sessions at their convenience and play full rounds when it suits their schedule.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and allows members to bring friends and family to sessions with no guest fees.
